---
title: "Dr Alana Gadsby"
image: "../images/alana.jpg"
role: alumni
programme: [gambling]
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
listing:
   - id: badges
     contents: "../badges_awarded/alana/*.jpg"
     template: ../badges.ejs
---

Dr Alana Gadsby is a clinical psychologist who completed her doctoral thesis in the lab (2026). 

Her research focused on the cognitive and neural mechanisms underlying risk-taking behavior in hypomania. Her project focused on the potential moderating roles of executive function and working memory. She used functional near infrared spectroscopy to look at neural activation during risk-taking. 

## Research Training

::: {#badges}

:::
